response.step_by_step_log:
The video features two performers singing famous anime songs. 
1. Song 'Kimi ga tame' (キミガタメ) was identified by on-screen text and audio. I simplified the artist for search to 'Utawarerumono' (the franchise the song is from) and searched: `"キミガタメ" Utawarerumono Japanese and English lyrics`.
2. Song 'Fuantei na kamisama' (不安定な神様) was identified by on-screen text and audio. I simplified the artist for search to 'Suara' (the singer of the original) and searched: `"不安定な神様" Suara Japanese and English lyrics`.
response.global_summary: A 2-song live performance by Hakui Koyori featuring a guest, presenting famous theme songs from the Utawarerumono anime series.

scenes.description: The two performers sing 'Kimi ga tame' on stage with a large screen displaying Utawarerumono-themed imagery. Text 'キミガタメ' appears at the start.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
きみの瞳に映る わたしは何色ですか
赤深き望むなら 渡そう陽の光を
悲しみが溢れ 瞼閉じました
こぼれた滴は 心に沁みゆく
行き渡る波は 弱く交えます
とどけしゆりかご 眠りをさそう
夢になつかし 面影をさがす
手を伸ばし 強く...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
What color am I reflected in your eyes?
If you wish for a deep red, I will give you the sunlight.
Sadness overflowed and I closed my eyelids.
The spilled drops soak into my heart.
The spreading waves mingle weakly.
The cradle I sent invites sleep.
I look for a familiar face in my dreams.
I reach out my hand, and strongly...
